metadata.description: Custom Claude Code skills and tools

plugins.name: auto-ralph
plugins.description: Gates imperative coding tasks (en/ro/ru) into Ralph Loops: a silent-by-default prompt hook flags matches, a deterministic 0-4 scorer routes score >= 3 to /ralph-loop

plugins.name: orchestrator
plugins.description: Decompose a task into parallel subagent workstreams via /orchestrate, /parallel, /plan-only

plugins.name: audit-agent
plugins.description: Audit commands: /jobs-audit (design simplification), /carlin-audit (BS detection), /vibe-audit (engineering quality), /multi-audit (parallel run + synthesis).

plugins.name: debate
plugins.description: Multi-model adversarial debate. Claude defends positions against external CLI models (agy/Gemini, Codex, Qwen) in parallel rounds. Refuses to run Claude-only; outputs consensus, tradeoff documents, or ADRs.

plugins.name: statusline
plugins.description: Powerline statusline renderer for Claude Code. Auto-configures only when no statusLine is set; never overwrites an existing one.

plugins.name: openclaw
plugins.description: OpenClaw expert skill — self-hosted multi-channel AI agent gateway. Grep-first retrieval over a chrome-stripped 268-page docs corpus: channels, providers, gateway config, CLI, sandboxing, automation.

plugins.name: diagnosticianul
plugins.description: Dr. House engineering persona plus four diagnostic protocol skills: critic (code autopsy), architect (system design), visual (UI/CSS/accessibility), core (algorithms/concurrency). Each protocol triggers on its own noun domain.

plugins.name: flutter
plugins.description: Flutter/Dart development skill — architecture scaffolds, Riverpod 3/BLoC state management, GoRouter, Freezed, testing, and CI/CD quality gates. Version-agnostic snippets; triggers only on explicit Flutter/Dart signals.

plugins.name: organon
plugins.description: Philosophical reasoning engine for engineering decisions and code reviews: 63 principles (0-62) from 20 philosophers, via /organon, /organon:decide, /organon:review.

plugins.name: seo-skill
plugins.description: Deterministic SEO analysis: Python engine (98 atomic checks) with multi-page crawler, real CWV via PageSpeed, optional GSC data, link graph/PageRank, auto-fix generation, and audit history with regression detection. One orchestrator skill plus 7 specialist agents.
